items.name: Handala (Iran-linked hacktivist group)
items.targets: Stryker medical device manufacturer (claimed wiper attack on 200K devices), Verifone payment systems, Israeli security researcher Raz Zimmt
items.ttps: T1485 Data Destruction, T1561 Disk Wipe, T1496 Resource Hijacking, T1566 Phishing, psychological warfare operations including fake shelter danger calls

items.name: Lazarus Group (North Korea APT)
items.targets: AllSecure CEO via fake LinkedIn interview, various tech sector targets
items.ttps: T1566.001 Spearphishing Attachment, T1204 User Execution, T1059 Command and Scripting Interpreter, social engineering via fake job interviews

items.name: APT28 (Fancy Bear, Russian state-sponsored)
items.targets: Signal and WhatsApp accounts in phishing campaign, cyber-espionage operations
items.ttps: T1566.002 Spearphishing Link, T1078 Valid Accounts, T1056 Input Capture, revived advanced malware toolkit for espionage

items.name: ShinyHunters
items.targets: Hundreds of Salesforce Experience Cloud customers in data theft campaign
items.ttps: T1190 Exploit Public-Facing Application, T1213 Data from Information Repositories, modified AuraInspector tool for mass-scanning Salesforce instances

items.name: Cl0p (CLOP) Ransomware Group
items.targets: AIGHEALTHCARE.IN claimed victim
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service, double extortion tactics

items.name: Akira Ransomware
items.targets: Robinson Nursery claimed victim
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1490 Inhibit System Recovery, T1083 File and Directory Discovery

items.name: Qilin Ransomware
items.targets: Arimex Importadora, US electric cooperative (purported)
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1490 Inhibit System Recovery, T1133 External Remote Services

items.name: Everest Ransomware
items.targets: UD Trucks database leaked
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service, T1020 Automated Exfiltration

items.name: Coinbase Cartel
items.targets: Canada Goose claimed victim
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service

items.name: BeatBanker/BTMOB Android Malware Operators
items.targets: Android users with banking trojan, crypto miner, and RAT payloads
items.ttps: T1566.002 Spearphishing Link, T1496 Resource Hijacking, T1417 Input Capture, T1412 Capture SMS Messages, dual-mode trojan operation

items.name: SurxRAT Operators
items.targets: Android users using LLMs for phishing and data theft
items.ttps: T1566 Phishing, T1417 Input Capture, T1636 Protected User Data, AI-generated phishing content

items.name: Scattered Spider (UNC3944)
items.targets: Cloud service abuse for enterprise hacking
items.ttps: T1078 Valid Accounts, T1566 Phishing, T1534 Internal Spearphishing, social engineering, cloud infrastructure exploitation

items.name: Murky Panda (China-nexus)
items.targets: Qatar amid Iranian conflict, shift focus from typical targets
items.ttps: T1566 Phishing, T1190 Exploit Public-Facing Application, regional geopolitical targeting

items.name: Cloudflare Anti-Bot Abusers
items.targets: Microsoft 365 credential theft via weaponized Cloudflare security features
items.ttps: T1566.002 Spearphishing Link, T1185 Browser Session Hijacking, T1528 Steal Application Access Token, abuse of legitimate security services

items.name: IPv6 Phishing Campaign Operators
items.targets: General users with free toothbrush scam using IPv6 to hide malicious links
items.ttps: T1566.002 Spearphishing Link, T1071 Application Layer Protocol, IPv6 obfuscation techniques

items.name: Planning and Zoning Permit Phishing Operators
items.targets: Local government officials and permit applicants for payment theft
items.ttps: T1566.002 Spearphishing Link, T1656 Impersonation, spoofing local officials to steal permit fees

items.name: Resume ISO Malware Distributors
items.targets: Canadian organizations via malicious ISO attachments in resumes
items.ttps: T1566.001 Spearphishing Attachment, T1204.002 Malicious File, ISO file exploitation

items.name: Tycoon 2FA Phishing-as-a-Service Operators
items.targets: Various organizations via phishing kit (platform disrupted by law enforcement)
items.ttps: T1566 Phishing, T1557 Adversary-in-the-Middle, 2FA bypass techniques, PhaaS platform

items.name: Teams/Zoom Masquerading Malware Distributors
items.targets: Enterprise users via signed malware disguised as legitimate collaboration apps
items.ttps: T1036.005 Match Legitimate Name or Location, T1553.002 Code Signing, T1219 Remote Access Software, RMM backdoor deployment

items.name: AWS AiTM Phishing Kit Operators
items.targets: AWS account hijacking via typosquatted domains and adversary-in-the-middle techniques
items.ttps: T1566.002 Spearphishing Link, T1557 Adversary-in-the-Middle, T1583.001 Domains, typosquatting for credential theft

items.name: DarkWebInformer
items.targets: Viking Line Ferries (alleged breach with passenger database and payment data), South Korean government server (root access with lateral movement to 42 hosts)
items.ttps: T1078 Valid Accounts, T1021 Remote Services, T1083 File and Directory Discovery, T1005 Data from Local System

canada_landscape.summary: Canada saw multiple threat developments in the past 48 hours. Canada Goose was claimed as a victim by the Coinbase Cartel ransomware group. Canadian organizations are being targeted with malicious ISO file attachments hidden in job resumes. Meta disabled 150K accounts linked to Southeast Asia scam centers affecting Canada among other nations. Research on Canadian Armed Forces cyber defence program history was published.
canada_landscape.retailers: Canada Goose reported as victim of Coinbase Cartel ransomware group
